name: coco-daily-routines
description: Daily kickoff and closeout workflow skills for Cortex Code (CoCo). Integrates Jira, Gmail, Slack, and Google Calendar to produce structured Obsidian notes.

skills.name: daily-kickoff
skills.description: Morning daily kickoff routine — pulls Jira tasks, checks email and Slack, writes kickoff note to Obsidian.

skills.name: daily-closeout
skills.description: End-of-day closeout routine — closes resolved Jira tasks, checks email and Slack, previews tomorrow, writes closeout note to Obsidian.
